resource_server.credential_transport: Authorization: Bearer on every protected HTTP request
resource_server.signature_verification: injected trusted local verifier; raw bearer is never forwarded
resource_server.expiry: exp must be strictly greater than injected current time
resource_server.not_before: nbf, when present, must be less than or equal to injected current time
resource_server.identity: bounded canonical tenant and principal claims

operation_scope_matrix.omniscient_debug: reserved and required; no MCP debug operation exists in the seven-tool v1 surface

errors.challenge: WWW-Authenticate Bearer with resource_metadata; insufficient scope also names the exact required scope

startup.authorized_non_loopback: disabled until G02-P4-B3/P4-B4 supply tenant quotas, rates, trusted proxy policy, audit and drain controls
